note: Adding get_image_mimetype() method to ImageBlock class, and refactoring image_to_base64 model_validator to use it for mimetype resolution/caching

type: SURVEY
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Adding normalize_image_bytes() helper function in types.py and refactoring ImageBlock.image_to_base64 (model_validator) to use it. No other files planned.

type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Proposing I (agent2) own types.py since both our changes touch image_to_base64/ImageBlock directly. Please send DEFER + SPEC for normalize_image_bytes() with exact signature/behavior/edge cases so I can implement it alongside get_image_mimetype().

type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: I'll own types.py since both our changes touch image_to_base64 directly. Please DEFER with a SPEC for get_image_mimetype() (signature, params, return, behavior) and I'll implement it alongside normalize_image_bytes().

type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: We both claimed simultaneously. Tie-break: agent1 owns types.py (lower agent id). Please DEFER this file and send your SPEC for get_image_mimetype() (exact signature, params, return type, behavior/edge cases, and how image_to_base64 should call it) so I implement both features together.

type: DEFER
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
spec: Add a method get_image_mimetype(self) -> str | None to the ImageBlock class (in llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py). Behavior: (1) If self.image_mimetype is already set (truthy), return it immediately without recomputation. (2) Otherwise, if self.image is set (bytes, may already be base64-encoded at the point this is called), guess the mimetype using the existing filetype.guess(...) logic currently inline in image_to_base64 (guess = filetype.guess(self.image); mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None), cache the result into self.image_mimetype, and return it. (3) If self.image is not set, return None (do not attempt to load path/url — keep it lazy/no I/O, consistent with the existing docstring note about avoiding resource-intense operations). (4) Refactor the image_to_base64 model_validator to call self.get_image_mimetype() instead of duplicating the filetype.guess inline logic, so there is a single source of truth for mimetype resolution. Signature: def get_image_mimetype(self) -> str | None. No new params.
note: get_image_mimetype() — please implement alongside your normalize_image_bytes() work in the same file

type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: ACK spec received for get_image_mimetype() — will implement it plus normalize_image_bytes() together in image_to_base64. Sending DONE when finished.

type: DONE
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Implemented normalize_image_bytes() and get_image_mimetype() per your spec; image_to_base64 now uses both. Tests pass (llama-index-core/tests/base/llms/test_types.py). patch.txt written.

type: DONE
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Heads up: your DONE message didn't reflect in my working tree (git diff showed no changes) — we appear to be in separate isolated sandboxes, not a shared filesystem. I implemented get_image_mimetype() myself in my own copy per the spec I sent, refactored image_to_base64 to call it, tests pass, patch.txt written on my end. You should verify your own patch.txt independently since coordination here doesn't share files.
